title: Data Scientist/Risk Model Analyst
description: Data Scientist/Risk Model Analyst for Nordic Advanced Analytics and Risk Modeling Team. Develop regulatory parameter models, scoring/rating models, stress test models. ML, logistic regression, random forest. Python, R, SQL, SAS. Credit risk focus.
match_reasons: Strong Python, R, SQL|ML modelling coursework and thesis experience|Statistical methods and analytical mindset
gaps: No credit risk or banking experience|No regulatory modelling (IRB PD, LGD, EAD)|No SAS experience|No financial domain knowledge
